description: Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act - Security and Privacy Rules applicable to AI systems handling PHI

controls.name: Access Control
controls.description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain PHI to allow access only to authorized persons.

controls.name: Unique User Identification
controls.description: Assign a unique name and/or number for identifying and tracking user identity.

controls.name: Audit Controls
controls.description: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in systems that contain or use PHI.

controls.name: Integrity
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to protect PHI from improper alteration or destruction.
typical_gaps: AI can modify records without approval

controls.name: Person or Entity Authentication
controls.description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to PHI is the one claimed.

controls.name: Transmission Security
controls.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to PHI that is being transmitted over an electronic network.

controls.name: Minimum Necessary
controls.description: Use, disclose, or request only the minimum amount of PHI needed to accomplish the intended purpose.
typical_gaps: All data sent to AI model

controls.name: Uses and Disclosures
controls.description: A covered entity may not use or disclose PHI except as permitted or required.
